title: Verify source and artifact privacy boundaries
steps: Inject unique canaries into source path, rows, descriptions, amounts, balances, identifiers, requests, and manifests; exercise success, expected failure, unexpected parser failure, cancellation, crash, abandonment, startup, compaction, and cleanup; inspect arguments, stdout policy, stderr, logs, diagnostics, files, permissions, and source hashes.
expected: No canary appears in process arguments, stderr, logs, crash diagnostics, or telemetry; sensitive stdout appears only for explicit inspect/preview; directories/files use 0700/0600; sources are unchanged; no source copy or extraction temporary remains.
